insights.text: Peak traffic at 06:00 (2 events) is 1.6x the hourly average — consider increasing staffing during this window
1 suspicious activity event(s) detected — recommend reviewing footage and increasing patrol frequency during affected hours
Badge compliance rate 9% (1/11 people) — below 80% target, recommend enforcing badge-visible policy
25% vehicle traffic (5/20 events) — consider optimizing parking layout and traffic flow for this volume
2 delivery vehicle event(s) observed — consider designating delivery windows to reduce congestion during peak hours
83% in work uniforms (5/6) — indicates service/construction worker traffic, consider value-oriented offerings
4 suspicious activity event(s) detected — recommend reviewing footage and increasing patrol frequency during affected hours
6 unauthorized access event(s) (tailgating, propped doors, expired badges, unescorted visitors) — immediate security review recommended
3 alarm/emergency event(s) detected (triggered alarms, unattended stations, blind spots) — investigate and address security gaps
5 patrol/escort event(s) recorded — indicates active security operations; verify patrol schedule adherence and coverage gaps
3 after-hours access event(s) — review against authorized after-hours personnel list for compliance
Dominant age group: young (62% of identified visitors) — suggests tailoring product mix and pricing to this demographic
44% of visitors arrive in groups (8 group events) — indicates social destination; optimize for group seating and multi-item orders
Observed drink ASP $5.29 (tall=8, grande=10, venti=7) vs SBUX reported ~$5.50 — bearish signal for average ticket
3 laptop users observed among 13 coffee drinkers — indicates work-from-cafe segment with longer dwell time and higher spend potential
53% actively ordering (16/30 events) — high conversion rate indicates strong purchase intent at this location
